sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100951" key="suntalasiourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συντᾰλᾰσιουργέω</orth>, <sense id="n100951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work wool together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
